summary: Decent audience recording that sounds better than other versions but still falls short of great quality.
review: The reviewer notes this tape plays better on speakers compared to other audience recordings of the same concert, though it is not considered great. No comments are made about the musical performance or specific songs.

ai_rating.rationale: Based on a single 3‑star review that mentions the recording is an improvement over other audience tapes but still not great; no musical details to adjust rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Plays better on speakers than other audience recordings, but overall sound quality is only moderate and not great.
